ORDER AND STIPULATION FOR MOTION TO BE HEARD BY A MEMBER OF THE CALIFORNIA BAR SERVING AS A TEMPORARY JUDGE

DISCOVERY, 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS GIS PLANNING INC. AND PABLO MONZON'S MOTION FOR ORDER RENDERING JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE COURT SETS A HEARING FOR JANUARY 25, 2012 AT 9:00 A.M. IN DEPARTMENT 302 FOR AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY TERMINATING SANCTIONS SHOULD NOT BE GRANTED IN THE EVENT DEFENDANT HAS NOT FULLY COMPLIED WITH THE COURT'S ORDER ENTERED OCTOBER 1, 2012 BEFORE THE HEARING DATE. ANY BRIEF OR RESPONSE IS LIMITED TO 5 PAGES, PLUS DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE, AND SHALL BE FILED AND SERVED IN ACCORDANCE WITH CCP 1005(B). COURTESY COPIES ARE TO BE PROVIDED TO DEPARTMENT 302 AT THE TIME OF FILING. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PROTEM: ERNST HALPERIN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-25-2013 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302
ORDER GRANTING MOTION FOR JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT

DISCOVERY 302, THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED. PLAINTIFFS GIS PLANNING, INC. AND PABLO MONZON'S MOTION FOR ORDER RENDERING A JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT AGAINST DEFENDANT MARCOS MONZON IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT MARCOS MONZON HAS FAILED TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER DATED OCTOBER 1, 2012. ORDER SIGNED. REBECCA WOODSON, JUDGE PRO-TEM, JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, CLERK, NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Moiton And Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar May-23-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Wallace P. Douglass, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Dov M. Grunschlag, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, GIS Planning, Inc. and Pablo Monzon.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Marcos Monzon.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Natalio Ubalde sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Compensatory Damages $20,000.00
Exemplary Damages $5,000.00
Costs: $1,889.60
Total Judgment in the amount of $26,889.60
Defendant Marcos Monzon, and others acting in concert with him, is hereby restrained and enjoined from (a) communicating in any fashion with any of GIS Planning, Inc.'s clients, prospective clients, and employees and (b) disparaging GIS Planning, Inc. and any of its officers. Defendant Marcos Monzon, and others acting in concert with him, is hereby restrained and enjoined from maintaning any and all date in his possession and control relating in any manner to GIS Planning, Inc., in whatever from such data may exist, wheter paper, disc, or electronic.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-08-2013 Set For Case Management Conference On Aug-07-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Order To Show Cause Why Terminating Sanctions Should Not Be Granted
Off Calendar Jan-25-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Dov M. Grunschlag, Carter Carter Fries & Grunschlag, 415.989.4800, appearing for the Plaintiffs;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

The tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiffs GIS PLANNING, INC. AND PABLO MONZON'S Motion for Order Rendering a Judgment by Default against Defendant MARCOS MONZON is GRANTED. Defendant MARCOS MONZON has failed to comply with the Court's order dated October 1, 2012. Order signed. Rebecca Woodson, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT

Notice Of Motion And Otion For Order Rendering Judgment By Default
Off Calendar Jan-04-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DOV M. GRUNSCHLAG, ESQ., 415.989.4800, FOR PLAINITFF GIS PLANNING INC.; NO OTHER APPEARANCES.

DEFENDANT IS deemed to have stipulated that the motion will be decided by the Pro Tem Judge with the same authority as a Superior Court Judge.

RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFs GIS PLANNING INC. and PABLO MONZON's MOtion For Order Rendering Judgment By Default is denied without prejudice. The Court sets a hearing for January 25, 2012 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 302 for an order to show cause why terminating sanctions should not be granted in the event defendant has not fully complied with the court's order entered October 1, 2012 before the hearing date. Any brief or response is limited to 5 pages, plus documentary evidence, and shall be filed and served in accordance with CCP 1005(b). Courtesy copies are to be provided to Department 302 at the time of filing. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge ProTem: Ernst Halperin, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Notice Of Motion For Orders Compelling Appearance At Deposition And Response To Document Demand, And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-01-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFS GIS PLANNING INC. and PABLO MONZON'S Motion For Orders Compelling Appearance At Deposition And Response To Document Demand, And For Monetary Sanctions is granted. Order signed in open court. Pro Tem Judge: James Watson, Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-03-2012 Set For Trial On Mar-11-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
